title: ditaxis serrata var. californica
intro: Ditaxis serrata var. californica, also known as California prickly poppy, is a shrubby perennial plant that belongs to the Euphorbiaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Ditaxis serrata var. californica include treating wounds, skin irritations, and digestive issues, as well as reducing fever and pain. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and salves, and its sap can be used topically to aid in the healing process.
